method: time from launching a real torch matmul load until nvidia-smi -i1 util>=40%, 10 reps, GPU1 only (GPU0/ego-stack untouched), thermal-guarded
note: D is dominated by CUDA cold-start (new-load visibility), not the 26ms poll; this is the D for detecting a newly-admitted pod's productivity. For probing already-running pods, D ~= poll interval + 26ms.
